addons.name: SlySuite
addons.description: Top-level addon manager and error sandbox for the Sly addon family.

addons.name: SlySuite_Error
addons.description: Shared error capture, storage and diagnostics for the SlySuite addon family. /slyerror

addons.name: SlySuite_Style
addons.description: Canonical theme/style system for SlySuite. Shared palette, frame helpers, theme-change callbacks used by all Sly addons. /slystyle to manage.

addons.name: SlySuite_WeakAuras
addons.description: WeakAura pack manager: import, capture, and manage named WA export string packs (e.g. Yabba/Foji suite).

addons.name: ItemRackRevived
addons.description: Gear set manager with character screen popout. Replacement for ItemRack.

addons.name: GearScore
addons.description: Calculates and displays gear score on tooltips and character frame.

addons.name: ExtendedCharStats
addons.description: Extended character statistics panel showing spell power, crit, hit, haste, etc.

addons.name: SlySuite_Repair
addons.description: Auto-repair gear at any merchant. Reports cost to party/raid/say. /slyrepair

addons.name: SlySuite_Loot
addons.description: Master looter assistant: quality loot announcer + /roll tracker + winner picker. /slyloot

addons.name: SlySuite_Mount
addons.description: Favorite mounts list with zone-aware random pick (ground/flying). /slymount

addons.name: SlySuite_Itemizer
addons.description: Item compare, DPS score delta on tooltips, enchant/gem suggestions by class/spec. /slyitem

addons.name: SlySuite_AtlasLoot
addons.description: AtlasLoot integration: drop % on tooltips, target-aware rates, item search panel. /slyatlas

addons.name: SlySuite_Char
addons.description: Movable character sheet companion — extended stats + gear sets docked beside CharacterFrame. C key. /slychar

addons.name: SlySuite_Bag
addons.description: Unified bag window — all bags merged into one searchable grid. Replaces Baganator. /slybag

addons.name: SlySuite_Slot
addons.description: Action bar profile manager — save, load, export, and import action bar layouts per character. Replaces Myslot. /slyslot

addons.name: SlySuite_UF
addons.description: Unit frames — player, target, target-of-target, party. Replaces ZPerl. /slyuf to toggle.

addons.name: SlySuite_Metrics
addons.description: Damage + healing meter plus threat display. Multiple tab panels (DPS/HPS/Threat) in one draggable window. Replaces Details + TinyThreat. /sm or /slymetrics

addons.name: Whelp
addons.description: Yelp-style vendor rating system. Rate and review player service providers (enchanters, boosters, crafters, etc). /whelp to open.

backlog.description: Search wago.io for warrior WeakAuras (battle/commanding shout missing alert, shout duration tracker, Rend debuff, cooldown bars) and import best matches into SlyWeakAuras. Filter by TBC Anniversary game version.
